WITH driver_points AS (SELECT r.year, res.driverId, SUM(res.points) AS total_points FROM results AS res JOIN races AS r ON res.raceId = r.raceId WHERE r.year < 1975 GROUP BY r.year, res.driverId), champions AS (SELECT dp.year, dp.driverId FROM driver_points dp JOIN (SELECT year, MAX(total_points) AS max_points FROM driver_points GROUP BY year) mx ON dp.year = mx.year AND dp.total_points = mx.max_points) SELECT c.year, AVG(CAST(substr(res.time,1,2) AS REAL)*3600 + CAST(substr(res.time,4,2) AS REAL)*60 + CAST(substr(res.time,7,2) AS REAL) + CAST(substr(res.time,10) AS REAL)/1000.0) AS avg_time_seconds FROM champions c JOIN results res ON res.driverId = c.driverId JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId WHERE res.time IS NOT NULL AND r.year = c.year GROUP BY c.year

SELECT DISTINCT c.subtypes AS type FROM "cards" c JOIN "foreign_data" f ON c.uuid = f.uuid WHERE f.language = 'German' AND c.subtypes IS NOT NULL AND c.supertypes IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT DISTINCT c.supertypes AS type FROM "cards" c JOIN "foreign_data" f ON c.uuid = f.uuid WHERE f.language = 'German' AND c.subtypes IS NOT NULL AND c.supertypes IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "cards" WHERE (power IS NULL OR power = '*') AND (text LIKE '%triggered ability%')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "cards" AS T1 JOIN "legalities" AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid JOIN "rulings" AS T3 ON T1.uuid = T3.uuid WHERE T2.format = 'premodern' AND T3.text = 'This is a triggered mana ability.' AND T1.side IS NULL

SELECT T2.name FROM "cards" AS T1 JOIN "foreign_data" AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T1.artist = 'Matthew D. Wilson' AND T1.layout = 'normal' AND T1.borderColor = 'black' AND T1.types LIKE '%Creature%' AND T2.language = 'French'
SELECT DISTINCT language FROM "set_translations" WHERE setCode = (SELECT code FROM "sets" WHERE block = 'Ravnica' AND baseSetSize = 180)

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.hasContentWarning = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM "cards" AS T1 JOIN "legalities" AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T2.format = 'commander' AND T2.status = 'legal'

SELECT (CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN fd.language = 'French' THEN c.id END) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT c.id)) * 100 FROM cards AS c LEFT JOIN foreign_data AS fd ON fd.uuid = c.uuid WHERE (c.power IS NULL OR c.power = '*')
SELECT language FROM "foreign_data" WHERE multiverseid = 149934
SELECT (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN layout = 'normal' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*)) * 100 FROM cards WHERE isTextless = 1
SELECT DISTINCT st.language FROM "set_translations" AS st JOIN "sets" AS s ON st.setCode = s.code WHERE s.mcmName = 'Archenemy' AND s.code = 'ARC'
SELECT DISTINCT language FROM foreign_data WHERE name = 'A Pedra Fellwar'
SELECT name FROM "cards" WHERE name IN ('Serra Angel','Shrine Keeper') AND convertedManaCost IS NOT NULL ORDER BY convertedManaCost DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT T2.translation FROM "cards" AS T1 JOIN "set_translations" AS T2 ON T1.setCode = T2.setCode WHERE T1.name = 'Ancestor''s Chosen' AND T2.language = 'Italian'
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM "cards" AS T1 JOIN "foreign_data" AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T1.name = 'Ancestor''s Chosen' AND T2.language = 'Korean')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "cards" AS T1 JOIN "sets" AS T2 ON T1.setCode = T2.code JOIN "set_translations" AS T3 ON T2.code = T3.setCode WHERE T3.translation = 'Hauptset Zehnte Edition' AND T1.artist = 'Adam Rex'
SELECT translation FROM set_translations WHERE setCode = (SELECT code FROM sets WHERE name = 'Eighth Edition') AND language = 'Chinese Simplified'
SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "cards" AS T1 JOIN "sets" AS T2 ON T1.setCode = T2.code WHERE T1.name = 'Angel of Mercy' AND T2.mtgoCode IS NOT NULL)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) FROM "sets" AS s JOIN "set_translations" AS st ON s.code = st.setCode WHERE s.block = 'Ice Age' AND st.language = 'Italian' AND st.translation IS NOT NULL
SELECT T1.isForeignOnly FROM sets AS T1 JOIN cards AS T2 ON T1.code = T2.setCode WHERE T2.name = 'Adarkar Valkyrie' LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) FROM "sets" AS s JOIN "set_translations" AS st ON st.setCode = s.code WHERE st.language = 'Italian' AND st.translation IS NOT NULL AND s.baseSetSize < 10
SELECT DISTINCT artist FROM "cards" WHERE setCode = 'Coldsnap' AND artist IN ('Jeremy Jarvis','Aaron Miller','Chippy')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "cards" AS T1 JOIN "sets" AS T2 ON T1.setCode = T2.code WHERE T2.name = 'Coldsnap' AND T1.convertedManaCost > 5 AND (T1.power = '*' OR T1.power IS NULL)
SELECT T2.flavorText FROM "cards" AS T1 JOIN "foreign_data" AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T2.language = 'Italian' AND T1.name = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'

SELECT T2.text FROM "cards" AS T1 JOIN "rulings" AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid JOIN "foreign_data" AS T3 ON T1.uuid = T3.uuid JOIN "sets" AS T4 ON T1.setCode = T4.code WHERE T4.name = 'Coldsnap' AND T3.language = 'Italian'

SELECT T2.name FROM "cards" AS T1 JOIN "foreign_data" AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T1.setCode = 'CSP' AND T2.language = 'Italian' AND T1.convertedManaCost = (SELECT MAX(convertedManaCost) FROM "cards" WHERE setCode = 'CSP')
SELECT CAST(SUM(convertedManaCost = 7) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM "cards" AS T1 JOIN "sets" AS T2 ON T1.setCode = T2.code WHERE T2.name = 'Coldsnap'

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.cardKingdomFoilId IS NOT NULL AND T1.cardKingdomId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) * 100 FROM "cards" AS T1 JOIN "sets" AS T2 ON T1.setCode = T2.code WHERE T2.name = 'Coldsnap'

SELECT lc.format, c.name FROM legalities AS lc JOIN cards AS c ON lc.uuid = c.uuid WHERE lc.status = 'Banned' AND lc.format = (SELECT format FROM legalities WHERE status = 'Banned' GROUP BY format ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1)
SELECT T1.name, T2.format FROM "cards" AS T1 JOIN "legalities" AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T1.edhrecRank = 1 AND T2.status = 'Banned'
SELECT c.name, l.format FROM "cards" AS c JOIN "sets" AS s ON c.setCode = s.code JOIN "legalities" AS l ON l.uuid = c.uuid WHERE s.name = 'Hour of Devastation' AND l.status = 'Legal'

SELECT s.name FROM sets AS s WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM set_translations st WHERE st.setCode = s.code AND st.language = 'Korean') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM set_translations st2 WHERE st2.setCode = s.code AND st2.language LIKE '%Japanese%')
SELECT c.frameVersion, c.name, l.status FROM "cards" AS c LEFT JOIN "legalities" AS l ON c.uuid = l.uuid AND l.status = 'Banned' WHERE c.artist = 'Allen Williams'
SELECT bond_type FROM bond WHERE bond_type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY bond_type ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT AVG(oxygen_count) FROM (SELECT a.molecule_id, SUM(CASE WHEN a.element = 'o' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS oxygen_count FROM atom AS a WHERE a.molecule_id IN (SELECT b.molecule_id FROM bond AS b WHERE b.bond_type = '-') GROUP BY a.molecule_id) AS sub

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.bond_type = '-' AND T3.label = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.atom_id) FROM "atom" AS T1 JOIN "bond" AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id JOIN "molecule" AS T3 ON T1.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id WHERE T3.label = '+' AND T2.bond_type = '-'
SELECT DISTINCT T1.molecule_id FROM "bond" AS T1 JOIN "molecule" AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.bond_type = '#' AND T2.label = '+'

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.element = 'c' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.atom_id) * 100 FROM "atom" AS T1 JOIN "molecule" AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T2.molecule_id IN (SELECT molecule_id FROM "bond" WHERE bond_type = '=')
SELECT DISTINCT T1.element FROM "atom" AS T1 JOIN "connected" AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id WHERE T2.bond_id = 'TR004_8_9'

SELECT DISTINCT element FROM (SELECT a.element FROM "atom" AS a JOIN "connected" AS c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id JOIN "bond" AS b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id WHERE b.bond_type = '=' UNION SELECT a2.element FROM "atom" AS a2 JOIN "connected" AS c ON a2.atom_id = c.atom_id2 JOIN "bond" AS b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id WHERE b.bond_type = '=')
SELECT m.label FROM atom AS a JOIN molecule AS m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id WHERE a.element = 'h' AND m.label IS NOT NULL GROUP BY m.label ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT element FROM molecule AS T1 JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.label = '-' GROUP BY T2.element ORDER BY COUNT(T2.element) ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT T3.bond_type FROM "connected" AS T1 JOIN "bond" AS T3 ON T1.bond_id = T3.bond_id WHERE (T1.atom_id = 'TR004_8' AND T1.atom_id2 = 'TR004_20') OR (T1.atom_id = 'TR004_20' AND T1.atom_id2 = 'TR004_8')

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.atom_id) FROM "atom" AS T1 JOIN "molecule" AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id JOIN "bond" AS T3 ON T2.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id WHERE (T1.element = 'i' OR T1.element = 's') AND T3.bond_type = '-'

SELECT CAST((COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T1.molecule_id NOT IN (SELECT molecule_id FROM atom WHERE element = 'f') THEN T1.molecule_id END) * 100) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.molecule_id) FROM molecule AS T1 WHERE T1.label = '+'

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.bond_type = '#' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.bond_id) AS percent FROM "molecule" AS T1 JOIN "bond" AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.label = '+'
SELECT DISTINCT element FROM atom WHERE molecule_id = 'TR000' AND element IS NOT NULL ORDER BY element ASC LIMIT 3
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN bond_type = '=' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(bond_id) * 100 AS percentage FROM bond WHERE molecule_id = 'TR008'
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN label = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(molecule_id) * 100 AS percentage FROM molecule
SELECT ROUND(CAST(SUM(element = 'h') AS REAL) / COUNT(atom_id) * 100, 4) FROM atom WHERE molecule_id = 'TR206'
SELECT a.element, m.label FROM "atom" AS a JOIN "molecule" AS m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id WHERE m.molecule_id = 'TR060'

SELECT b.bond_type, m.label FROM bond AS b JOIN molecule AS m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id WHERE m.molecule_id = 'TR010' AND b.bond_type = (SELECT bond_type FROM bond WHERE molecule_id = 'TR010' GROUP BY bond_type ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1) LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id FROM molecule AS m JOIN bond AS b ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id JOIN connected AS c ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id WHERE m.label = '-' AND b.bond_type = '-' ORDER BY m.molecule_id ASC LIMIT 3
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b.bond_id) FROM "bond" AS b JOIN "connected" AS c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id WHERE b.molecule_id = 'TR009' AND (c.atom_id = 'TR009_12' OR c.atom_id2 = 'TR009_12')
SELECT b.bond_type, c.atom_id, c.atom_id2 FROM "bond" AS b JOIN "connected" AS c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id WHERE b.bond_id = 'TR001_6_9'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "connected" WHERE atom_id LIKE 'TR%_19' OR atom_id2 LIKE 'TR%_19'
SELECT DISTINCT T1.element FROM "atom" AS T1 JOIN "molecule" AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T2.molecule_id = 'TR004'
SELECT DISTINCT T1.molecule_id FROM "atom" AS T1 JOIN "molecule" AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE SUBSTR(T1.atom_id, 7, 2) BETWEEN '21' AND '25' AND T2.label = '+'

SELECT DISTINCT c.bond_id FROM connected AS c JOIN atom AS a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id JOIN atom AS a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id WHERE (a1.element = 'p' AND a2.element = 'n') OR (a1.element = 'n' AND a2.element = 'p')

SELECT CASE WHEN label = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_carcinogenic FROM molecule WHERE molecule_id = (SELECT molecule_id FROM bond WHERE bond_type = ' = ' GROUP BY molecule_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1)
SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT T3.bond_id) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.atom_id) FROM "atom" AS T1 JOIN "connected" AS T3 ON T1.atom_id = T3.atom_id WHERE T1.element = 'i'
SELECT DISTINCT T1.element FROM "atom" AS T1 WHERE T1.atom_id NOT IN (SELECT atom_id FROM "connected" UNION SELECT atom_id2 FROM "connected")

SELECT c.atom_id FROM "connected" AS c JOIN "bond" AS b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id WHERE b.molecule_id = 'TR041' AND b.bond_type = '#' UNION SELECT c.atom_id2 FROM "connected" AS c JOIN "bond" AS b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id WHERE b.molecule_id = 'TR041' AND b.bond_type = '#'
SELECT element FROM atom WHERE atom_id IN (SELECT atom_id FROM connected WHERE bond_id = 'TR144_8_19' UNION SELECT atom_id2 FROM connected WHERE bond_id = 'TR144_8_19')

SELECT a.element FROM "atom" AS a JOIN "connected" AS c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id JOIN "bond" AS b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id WHERE b.bond_type = '#' UNION ALL SELECT a2.element FROM "atom" AS a2 JOIN "connected" AS c2 ON a2.atom_id = c2.atom_id2 JOIN "bond" AS b2 ON c2.bond_id = b2.bond_id WHERE b2.bond_type = '#'
SELECT printf('%.5f', (SUM(CASE WHEN m.label = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(b.bond_id)) FROM bond AS b JOIN molecule AS m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id WHERE b.bond_type = '-'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM atom AS a WHERE a.molecule_id IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bond b WHERE b.molecule_id = a.molecule_id AND b.bond_type = '#') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM atom a2 WHERE a2.molecule_id = a.molecule_id AND a2.element IN ('p','br'))
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN element = 'cl' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) FROM atom WHERE molecule_id IN (SELECT molecule_id FROM bond WHERE bond_type = '-')

SELECT DISTINCT T1.element FROM "atom" AS T1 JOIN "connected" AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id WHERE T2.bond_id = 'TR001_10_11' UNION SELECT DISTINCT T1.element FROM "atom" AS T1 JOIN "connected" AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id2 WHERE T2.bond_id = 'TR001_10_11'

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.element = 'cl' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.molecule_id) * 100 FROM "atom" AS T1 JOIN "molecule" AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T2.label = '+'
SELECT T1.element FROM "atom" AS T1 JOIN "molecule" AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T2.label = '+' AND substr(T1.atom_id, 7, 1) = '4'

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN element = 'h' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) AS ratio, label FROM atom JOIN molecule ON atom.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id WHERE atom.molecule_id = 'TR006' GROUP BY atom.molecule_id, label
SELECT T1.molecule_id FROM "molecule" AS T1 JOIN "atom" AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.label = '-' GROUP BY T1.molecule_id HAVING COUNT(T2.atom_id) > 5
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schools AS s JOIN satscores AS sat ON s.CDSCode = sat.cds WHERE sat.AvgScrMath > 400 AND s.Virtual = 'F'
SELECT CDSCode FROM frpm WHERE "Enrollment (K-12)" IS NOT NULL AND "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" IS NOT NULL AND ("Enrollment (K-12)" + "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" > 500)

SELECT MAX(CAST("Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" AS REAL) / CAST("Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" AS REAL)) FROM frpm AS T1 JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds WHERE (CAST(T2.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / T2.NumTstTakr) > 0.3 AND T2.NumTstTakr IS NOT NULL AND T2.NumGE1500 IS NOT NULL AND "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" IS NOT NULL AND "Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" IS NOT NULL
SELECT CharterNum FROM satscores AS T1 JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode WHERE AvgScrWrite > 499 AND CharterNum IS NOT NULL ORDER BY AvgScrWrite DESC

SELECT T1."School Name" AS school_name, (COALESCE(T2.Street,'') || ' ' || COALESCE(T2.StreetAbr,'') || ', ' || COALESCE(T2.City,'') || ', ' || COALESCE(T2.State,'') || ' ' || COALESCE(T2.Zip,'')) AS full_address FROM frpm AS T1 JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1."Enrollment (K-12)" IS NOT NULL AND T1."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" IS NOT NULL AND (CAST(T1."Enrollment (K-12)" AS REAL) - CAST(T1."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" AS REAL)) > 30
SELECT DISTINCT T1."School Name" FROM frpm AS T1 JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds WHERE (CAST(T1."Free Meal Count (K-12)" AS REAL) / T1."Enrollment (K-12)") > 0.1 AND T2.NumGE1500 > 0

SELECT sch.School, sch.FundingType FROM schools AS sch JOIN satscores AS ss ON sch.CDSCode = ss.cds WHERE sch.County = 'Riverside' AND (SELECT CAST(SUM(ss2.AvgScrMath) AS REAL) / COUNT(ss2.AvgScrMath) FROM schools AS sch2 JOIN satscores AS ss2 ON sch2.CDSCode = ss2.cds WHERE sch2.County = 'Riverside' AND ss2.AvgScrMath IS NOT NULL) > 400

SELECT T3.School AS name, T3.Street || ' ' || COALESCE(T3.StreetAbr, '') || ', ' || T3.City || ', ' || T3.State || ' ' || T3.Zip AS full_communication_address FROM frpm AS T1 JOIN schools AS T3 ON T1.CDSCode = T3.CDSCode WHERE T1.`High Grade` = '12' AND T3.County = 'Monterey' AND T1.`FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)` > 800

SELECT satscores.sname AS "School Name", satscores.AvgScrWrite AS "Average Writing Score", schools.Phone AS "Communication Number" FROM satscores JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode WHERE (schools.OpenDate > '1991-12-31' OR schools.ClosedDate < '2000-01-01') AND satscores.AvgScrWrite IS NOT NULL

WITH diffs AS (SELECT "School Name", "DOC", ("Enrollment (K-12)" - "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") AS diff FROM frpm WHERE "Charter Funding Type" = 'Local'), avg_diff AS (SELECT AVG(diff) AS avg FROM diffs) SELECT T1."School Name", T2.DOCType FROM diffs AS T1 JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1."School Name" = T2.School JOIN avg_diff AS T3 ON T1.diff > T3.avg
SELECT CAST(`Free Meal Count (K-12)` AS REAL) / `Enrollment (K-12)` AS eligible_free_rate FROM frpm WHERE `Enrollment (K-12)` IS NOT NULL ORDER BY `Enrollment (K-12)` DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 9

SELECT CAST("FRPM Count (K-12)" AS REAL) / "Enrollment (K-12)" AS rate FROM frpm AS T1 JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.Charter = 66 AND "FRPM Count (K-12)" IS NOT NULL AND "Enrollment (K-12)" IS NOT NULL ORDER BY "FRPM Count (K-12)" DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT s.Street, s.City, s.Zip, s.State FROM schools AS s JOIN satscores AS sc ON s.CDSCode = sc.cds WHERE sc.NumGE1500 IS NOT NULL AND sc.NumTstTakr IS NOT NULL AND sc.NumTstTakr <> 0 ORDER BY CAST(sc.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / sc.NumTstTakr ASC LIMIT 1

WITH top_school AS (SELECT cds FROM satscores WHERE NumGE1500 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY NumGE1500 DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT trim(AdmFName1 || ' ' || AdmLName1) AS full_name FROM schools JOIN top_school ON schools.CDSCode = top_school.cds WHERE AdmFName1 IS NOT NULL AND AdmLName1 IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT trim(AdmFName2 || ' ' || AdmLName2) FROM schools JOIN top_school ON schools.CDSCode = top_school.cds WHERE AdmFName2 IS NOT NULL AND AdmLName2 IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT trim(AdmFName3 || ' ' || AdmLName3) FROM schools JOIN top_school ON schools.CDSCode = top_school.cds WHERE AdmFName3 IS NOT NULL AND AdmLName3 IS NOT NULL
SELECT AVG(NumTstTakr) FROM satscores AS T1 JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.City = 'Fresno' AND T2.OpenDate BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1980-12-31'
SELECT s.Phone FROM satscores AS t JOIN schools AS s ON t.cds = s.CDSCode WHERE s.District = 'Fresno Unified' AND t.AvgScrRead IS NOT NULL ORDER BY t.AvgScrRead ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT s.School FROM (SELECT sch.CDSCode, sch.School, sch.County, ss.AvgScrRead, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sch.County ORDER BY ss.AvgScrRead DESC) AS rn FROM schools AS sch JOIN satscores AS ss ON sch.CDSCode = ss.cds WHERE sch.Virtual = 'F' AND ss.AvgScrRead IS NOT NULL) AS s WHERE s.rn <= 5

SELECT T2.School, T1.AvgScrWrite FROM satscores AS T1 JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode WHERE (T2.AdmLName1 = 'Ulrich' AND T2.AdmFName1 = 'Ricci') OR (T2.AdmLName2 = 'Ulrich' AND T2.AdmFName2 = 'Ricci') OR (T2.AdmLName3 = 'Ulrich' AND T2.AdmFName3 = 'Ricci')

SELECT T1."School" FROM "schools" AS T1 JOIN "frpm" AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.DOC = '31' AND T2."Enrollment (K-12)" IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CAST(T2."Enrollment (K-12)" AS REAL) DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) AS REAL) / 12 FROM schools WHERE County = 'Alameda' AND DOC = '52' AND strftime('%Y', OpenDate) = '1980'
SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN DOC = '54' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(CASE WHEN DOC = '52' THEN 1 END) FROM schools WHERE County = 'Orange' AND StatusType = 'Active'

SELECT T3.School AS "School Name", T3.MailStreet AS "Postal Street Address" FROM satscores AS T1 JOIN schools AS T3 ON T1.cds = T3.CDSCode WHERE T1.AvgScrMath IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T1.AvgScrMath DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 6
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "frpm" WHERE "Charter School (Y/N)" = 0 AND "County Name" = 'Los Angeles' AND ("Free Meal Count (K-12)" * 100.0 / "Enrollment (K-12)") < 0.18

SELECT SUM(CAST(frpm."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" AS REAL)) FROM frpm JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode WHERE frpm."Academic Year" = '2014-2015' AND schools.EdOpsCode = 'SSS' AND schools.City = 'Fremont' AND schools.School = 'State Special School'

SELECT "School Name", (CAST("FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)" AS REAL) / "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" * 100) AS "Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)" FROM frpm WHERE "County Name" = 'Los Angeles' AND "Low Grade" = 'Kindergarten' AND "High Grade" IN ('9','9th','9th grade') AND "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" IS NOT NULL AND "FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)" IS NOT NULL
SELECT County, COUNT(*) AS school_count FROM schools WHERE Virtual = 'F' AND County IN ('San Diego','Santa Barbara') GROUP BY County ORDER BY school_count DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT frpm."Low Grade", frpm."High Grade" FROM frpm JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode WHERE schools.Longitude IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ABS(schools.Longitude) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT s.City, COUNT(*) AS school_count, SUM(CASE WHEN f."NSLP Provision Status" = 'Multiple Provision Types' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS multiple_provision_count FROM schools AS s JOIN frpm AS f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode WHERE s.Magnet = 1 AND f."Low Grade" = 'K' AND f."High Grade" = '8' AND s.City IS NOT NULL GROUP BY s.City

SELECT T1.`District Code`, CAST(T1.`Free Meal Count (K-12)` AS REAL) / T1.`Enrollment (K-12)` * 100 AS "Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)" FROM frpm AS T1 JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.AdmFName1 = 'Alusine' OR T2.AdmFName2 = 'Alusine' OR T2.AdmFName3 = 'Alusine'

SELECT DISTINCT AdmEmail1, AdmEmail2, AdmEmail3 FROM schools WHERE County = 'San Bernardino' AND District = 'San Bernardino City Unified' AND OpenDate BETWEEN '2009-01-01' AND '2010-12-31' AND (DOC = '54' OR SOC = '62') AND AdmEmail1 IS NOT NULL AND AdmEmail1 != '' AND AdmEmail2 IS NOT NULL AND AdmEmail2 != '' AND AdmEmail3 IS NOT NULL AND AdmEmail3 != ''

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.account_id) FROM "account" AS T1 JOIN "district" AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id JOIN "trans" AS T3 ON T1.account_id = T3.account_id JOIN "card" AS T4 ON T1.account_id = (SELECT T5.account_id FROM "disp" AS T5 WHERE T5.disp_id = T4.disp_id) WHERE T2.A3 = 'East Bohemia' AND T4.issued > T3.date AND T3.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.district_id) FROM district d JOIN client c ON d.district_id = c.district_id WHERE c.gender = 'F' GROUP BY d.district_id HAVING AVG(CAST(d.A11 AS REAL)) > 6000 AND AVG(CAST(d.A11 AS REAL)) < 10000
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM client AS T1 JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.gender = 'M' AND T2.A3 = 'north Bohemia' AND CAST(T2.A11 AS REAL) > 8000

WITH female_clients AS (SELECT client_id, birth_date, district_id FROM client WHERE gender = 'F'), oldest_female AS (SELECT district_id FROM female_clients WHERE birth_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY birth_date ASC LIMIT 1), lowest_avg_salary_district AS (SELECT A11 FROM district WHERE district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM oldest_female) ORDER BY A11 ASC LIMIT 1), highest_avg_salary_district AS (SELECT A11 FROM district WHERE A11 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY A11 DESC LIMIT 1), female_accounts AS (SELECT a.account_id FROM account a JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id JOIN female_clients fc ON d.client_id = fc.client_id JOIN oldest_female of ON fc.district_id = of.district_id) SELECT fa.account_id, (SELECT A11 FROM highest_avg_salary_district) - (SELECT A11 FROM lowest_avg_salary_district) AS gap FROM female_accounts fa

SELECT T1.account_id FROM account AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id JOIN district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE T3.birth_date = (SELECT MAX(birth_date) FROM client) AND T4.A11 = (SELECT MAX(A11) FROM district) GROUP BY T1.account_id

SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id FROM account AS a JOIN loan AS l ON a.account_id = l.account_id WHERE a.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE' AND lower(l.status) = 'approved' AND strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1997' AND l.amount = (SELECT MIN(l2.amount) FROM loan AS l2 JOIN account AS a2 ON a2.account_id = l2.account_id WHERE a2.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE' AND lower(l2.status) = 'approved' AND strftime('%Y', l2.date) = '1997')

SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id FROM account AS a JOIN loan AS l ON a.account_id = l.account_id WHERE strftime('%Y', a.date) = '1993' AND l.duration > 12 AND l.amount = (SELECT MAX(l2.amount) FROM account AS a2 JOIN loan AS l2 ON a2.account_id = l2.account_id WHERE strftime('%Y', a2.date) = '1993' AND l2.duration > 12)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_id) FROM client AS c JOIN district AS d ON c.district_id = d.district_id JOIN disp AS disp ON disp.client_id = c.client_id JOIN account AS a ON a.account_id = disp.account_id WHERE c.gender = 'F' AND c.birth_date < '1950-01-01' AND d.A2 = 'Sokolov'

SELECT d.A2 FROM client AS c JOIN disp AS dsp ON c.client_id = dsp.client_id JOIN account AS a ON dsp.account_id = a.account_id JOIN district AS d ON a.district_id = d.district_id WHERE c.gender = 'F' AND c.birth_date = '1976-01-29'

SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN gender = 'M' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) * 100 FROM client WHERE district_id = (SELECT district_id FROM district WHERE A3 = 'south Bohemia' AND A4 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CAST(A4 AS REAL) DESC LIMIT 1)

SELECT ((b2.balance - b1.balance) / CAST(b1.balance AS REAL)) * 100 AS increase_rate FROM (SELECT l.account_id FROM loan l WHERE l.date = '1993-07-05' ORDER BY l.loan_id ASC LIMIT 1) AS fl JOIN disp d ON d.account_id = fl.account_id JOIN client c ON c.client_id = d.client_id JOIN trans b1 ON b1.account_id = fl.account_id AND b1.date = '1993-03-22' JOIN trans b2 ON b2.account_id = fl.account_id AND b2.date = '1998-12-27'
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'A' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(amount) FROM loan WHERE amount > 0

SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T1.status = 'C' THEN T1.account_id END) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.account_id) * 100 FROM "loan" AS T1 JOIN "account" AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T1.amount < 100000

SELECT T4.A2, CAST((T4.A13 - T4.A12) AS REAL) / T4.A12 * 100 AS unemployment_increment_percentage FROM loan AS T1 JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN disp AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id JOIN district AS T4 ON T2.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE T1.status = 'D'

SELECT d.A2 FROM district AS d JOIN account AS a ON d.district_id = a.district_id JOIN disp AS dp ON a.account_id = dp.account_id JOIN client AS c ON dp.client_id = c.client_id WHERE c.gender = 'F' GROUP BY d.district_id, d.A2 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 9

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM loan AS T1 JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T1.status = 'A' AND T1.amount >= 250000 AND T2.frequency = 'POPLATEK MESICNE' AND T1.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'

SELECT T1.A2 AS district_name, T2.amount FROM "district" AS T1 JOIN "account" AS T3 ON T1.district_id = T3.district_id JOIN "trans" AS T2 ON T3.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T2.type = 'VYDAJ' AND T2.date LIKE '1996-01%' AND T2.operation != 'VKLAD KARTOU' ORDER BY T2.amount DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.account_id) FROM "account" AS a JOIN "loan" AS l ON a.account_id = l.account_id JOIN "district" AS d ON a.district_id = d.district_id WHERE l.status IN ('C','D') AND d.A2 = '1'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM client WHERE gender = 'M' AND district_id = (SELECT district_id FROM district WHERE A15 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY A15 DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1)

SELECT DISTINCT d.client_id FROM disp AS d JOIN account AS a ON d.account_id = a.account_id JOIN trans AS t ON a.account_id = t.account_id WHERE t.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' AND strftime('%Y', t.date) = '1998' AND t.amount < (SELECT AVG(t2.amount) FROM trans AS t2 WHERE t2.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' AND strftime('%Y', t2.date) = '1998')
SELECT DISTINCT T1.frequency FROM "account" AS T1 JOIN "district" AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.frequency != 'OWNER' AND T2.A11 > 8000 AND T2.A11 <= 9000
SELECT AVG(A15) FROM district WHERE A15 > 4000 AND district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM account WHERE date >= '1997-01-01')

SELECT T.* FROM "trans" AS T JOIN "account" AS A ON T.account_id = A.account_id JOIN "disp" AS D ON A.account_id = D.account_id JOIN "client" AS C ON D.client_id = C.client_id WHERE C.client_id = 3356 AND T.operation = 'VYBER'

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T3.gender = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) * 100 FROM account AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id JOIN district AS T4 ON T1.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE T4.A11 > 10000

SELECT (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T2.date) = '1997' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) - SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T2.date) = '1996' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T2.date) = '1996' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) * 100 FROM loan AS T1 JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN disp AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id JOIN client AS T4 ON T3.client_id = T4.client_id WHERE T4.gender = 'M'
SELECT COUNT(*), SUM(amount) FROM trans WHERE account_id = 3 AND type = 'VYDAJ' AND k_symbol = '3539'

SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'M' AND T2.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE' THEN T1.client_id END) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T2.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE' THEN T1.client_id END) * 100 FROM "client" AS T1 JOIN "disp" AS T3 ON T1.client_id = T3.client_id JOIN "account" AS T2 ON T3.account_id = T2.account_id

SELECT T1.account_id FROM account AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id JOIN district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE T3.gender = 'F' AND T3.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender = 'F') AND T4.A11 = (SELECT MIN(CAST(A11 AS REAL)) FROM district)

SELECT AVG(T1.amount) FROM loan AS T1 JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN trans AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T1.status IN ('C', 'D') AND T3.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'

SELECT T3.client_id, CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', T3.birth_date) AS INTEGER) AS age FROM card AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.disp_id = T2.disp_id JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id WHERE T1.type = 'gold' AND T2.type = 'OWNER'

SELECT "account".account_id, "district".A2, "district".A3 FROM "account" JOIN "district" ON "account".district_id = "district".district_id WHERE "account".frequency = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU' AND strftime('%Y', "account".date) = '1993'

SELECT T1.account_id, T1.frequency FROM "account" AS T1 JOIN "disp" AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN "client" AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id JOIN "district" AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE T4.A2 = 'east Bohemia' AND T1.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31'
